name: Israel
summary: Day 63 Thursday. IDF KINETIC ONGOING ON LEBANON FRONT (BEQAA + LITANI); ISRAEL DIPLOMATICALLY QUIET ON IRAN — TIMES OF ISRAEL APR 29-30 LIVEBLOG LEADS WITH LEBANON OPERATIONAL DETAILS, TRUMP-IRAN AS US-CHANNEL STORY. The division of labor (Iran = Trump's problem; Lebanon = Israel's prerogative) holds as a structural tone signal. Times of Israel Apr 29-30 liveblog continues to lead with Lebanon-front operational details (Litani bridges, Beqaa strikes); Trump-Iran diplomacy is a US-channel story rather than Israel-channel. Haaretz military correspondents running IDF-source content on the 122 Hezbollah rockets/drones challenge — Netanyahu's 'struggling to neutralize' admission is the political-pressure tell. Jerusalem Post pro-coalition framing unchanged. No new Israeli civilian casualty inside Israel proper since Apr 28 contractor death. The 14-day Israeli-civilian-casualty trigger remains at Day 5 of 14 (closes 2026-05-11). PRIOR DAY-1 SUMMARY (preserved): Civilian contractor working for Israel's Defense Ministry was killed Tuesday April 28 by Hezbollah drone in southern Lebanon; 19-year-old son lightly injured (CONFIRMED — Haaretz, Times of Israel, UPI). Contractors were working on demolition of buildings in southern Lebanese villages on behalf of an Israeli civilian company contracted by the Defense Ministry. PARTIAL TRIGGER ACTIVATION case — strict reading does NOT activate the 'Israeli civilian casualty' trigger (operational casualty in active war zone, not civilian struck inside Israel proper); maximalist reading DOES activate. Operative tag: edge weight increment 0.5-1.0 (partial activation), trigger remains at WATCHING (Day 4 of 14, closes 2026-05-11). [TRUNCATED — needs re-synthesis]
